creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
After I udated sources from r284336 to >r284404, I'm unable to "buildworld buildkernel" a system.

The buildworld process bails out at different steps depending on the settings in /etc/src.conf - but either with or without a custom /etc/src.conf, the sources do not build anymore. A very early failure is triggered if one is using the options
[...]
#
CXXFLAGS+=              -std=c++11
#
WITH_CLANG_FULL=        YES
WITH_CLANG_EXTRAS=      YES
WITH_LLDB=              YES
[...]

After a few initial steps, my system stops building with the error I attached below as an extraction.

Avoiding any /etc/src.conf (my removing it) makes the buildprocess bailing out later in the process.

The problem is seen on all platfoprms I use/maintain and also seen by many other users.


regards,
Oliver

[...]
